dataSources.name: NSFAS
dataSources.strategy: Foundation trust source; use official contact channels for verification checks.

dataSources.name: SA Youth
dataSources.strategy: High-priority jobs and learnership feed with accessibility focus.

dataSources.name: NEFCORP
dataSources.strategy: Alternative funding and entrepreneurship source; verify product pages before publishing.

dataSources.name: DBE Past Papers
dataSources.strategy: Official source for exam resources; prefer direct PDF links.

dataSources.name: Siyavula
dataSources.strategy: CAPS-aligned textbooks for reliable study support.

dataSources.name: SIU Reports
dataSources.strategy: Use as scam shield blacklist for fraud prevention.

dataSources.name: SADAG Helplines
dataSources.strategy: Expose discreet support entry points in user flow.

googleQueries.title: Grade 12 bursary PDFs
googleQueries.query: site:*.za (bursary OR scholarship OR funding) "Grade 12" filetype:pdf
googleQueries.purpose: Find downloadable bursary notices that mention Grade 12 learners.

googleQueries.title: Learnership opportunities
googleQueries.query: site:*.za (learnership OR internship OR apprenticeship) filetype:pdf
googleQueries.purpose: Surface learnership and internship postings from South African domains.

googleQueries.title: Past papers and memos
googleQueries.query: site:*.za ("past paper" OR memo OR exam) filetype:pdf
googleQueries.purpose: Discover exam resources for learners and tutors.

googleQueries.title: Study guides
googleQueries.query: site:*.za ("study guide" OR textbook OR worksheet) filetype:pdf

googleQueries.title: Open access research
googleQueries.query: site:*.ac.za OR site:*.edu.za (repository OR dissertation OR thesis) filetype:pdf
googleQueries.purpose: Surface academic repositories and open research outputs.

googleQueries.title: Open textbooks
googleQueries.query: site:*.za ("open textbook" OR OER OR "free textbook") filetype:pdf
googleQueries.purpose: Find educational open textbook and OER resources.

googleQueries.title: TVET NCV papers
googleQueries.query: site:*.za (NCV OR NATED OR TVET) (paper OR memo) filetype:pdf
googleQueries.purpose: Find TVET-specific exam papers and memos.

googleQueries.title: Fraud and scam alerts
googleQueries.query: site:*.za (scam OR fraud OR warning OR alert) bursary
googleQueries.purpose: Identify community warnings and official fraud notices.

googleQueries.title: NEF funding opportunities
googleQueries.query: site:nefcorp.co.za (funding OR grant OR entrepreneurship OR youth)
googleQueries.purpose: Find NEFCORP youth funding and entrepreneurship products.

googleQueries.title: SEDA programmes
googleQueries.query: site:seda.org.za (youth OR funding OR programme OR business)
googleQueries.purpose: Identify small-business support and youth enterprise programmes.
